zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe於大約1345年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir John de Mablethorpe27歲，母親Lady Matilda23歲。她於1368年與Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton在英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾布頓。

zh-hans.Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Englan: 英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾諾頓
zh-hans.Boughton, Northamptonshire, kingdom of E: 英国諾薩普頓史爾布頓
zh-hans.Norton, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾諾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe于大约1345年出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir John de Mablethorpe27岁，母亲Lady Matilda23岁。她于1368年与Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton在英国諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾布頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mablethorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Mablethorpe (Lincs), which is recorded as Malbertorp in 1086, Maubertorp in 1176.

variants.name: Mapletoft
meanings: English: (i) of uncertain origin; perhaps a locative name from an unidentified place, presumably in or near Lincs. (ii) alternatively, perhaps, a variant of Maplethorpe , modified as if containing Middle English toft ‘building plot’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe was born about 1345, in England, her father, Sir John de Mablethorpe, was 27 and her mother, Lady Matilda, was 23. She married Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton in 1368, in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She was buried in Boughton, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe est née environ 1345, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Mablethorpe, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Matilda, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton en 1368, à Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elleenterrée à Boughton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe um 1345 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Mablethorpe 27 und ihre Mutter Lady Matilda 23. Sie hat 1368 in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie wurde in Boughton, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe è nata il circa 1345 nel England, sua padre, Sir John de Mablethorpe, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Lady Matilda, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton nel 1368, nel Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Fu sepolta a Boughton, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Englan: イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノートン
ja.Boughton, Northamptonshire, kingdom of E: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアボウトン
ja.Norton, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノートン
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpeが約1345年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John de Mablethorpeは27歳，母Lady Matildaは23歳であった。1368年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートンでSir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Nortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアボウトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe(이)가 대략 1345년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Mablethorpe(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Matilda(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1368년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그렌'스 노르턴에서 Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 노르섬프토실르 부그h턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Englan: Norton, North Hamtunscire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe nasceu aproximadamente 1345, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Mablethorpe, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Matilda, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton em 1368, em Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Boughton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe родилась около 1345 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Mablethorpe было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Matilda, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton в 1368 г. в местности грине'с нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности боугтон, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe nació aproximadamente 1345, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Mablethorpe, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Matilda, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton en 1368, en Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Fue sepultada en Boughton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
